name: Pancake Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream butter and sugars together. Add egg yolk. Mix in 1 cup flour and a pinch of salt. Combine pecans with a tablespoon of flour and add to the mixture. Beat egg whites until stiff. Fold in vanilla extract. Using a teaspoon, scoop the batter onto a greased cookie sheet. Preheat oven to 350°F. Turn off the oven as soon as the cookies are placed inside. Leave them in the oven until lightly browned.
